items.title: The “real-time strategy game” model of managing agents is clearly a dead end.
items.title_zh: 管理代理人的“即时战略游戏”模式显然是一条死胡同。
items.description: The “real-time strategy game” model of managing agents is clearly a dead end. AI that’s ancient by current standards already beats >99% of human players and out-micros them to an extreme degree
items.description_zh: 管理代理人的“即时战略游戏”模式显然是一条死胡同。按照目前的标准来看，古老的人工智能已经击败了超过 99% 的人类玩家，并且在极端程度上超越了他们

items.title: Extracting a probability from a doctor is one of life's unnecessary boss battles.
items.title_zh: 从医生那里提取概率是生活中不必要的老板之战之一。
items.description: Extracting a probability from a doctor is one of life's unnecessary boss battles. Even if you beg them for an interval-valued subjective probability, and at that point you're basically asking for their hunch. I don't know if they get sued…
items.description_zh: 从医生那里提取概率是生活中不必要的老板之战之一。即使你请求他们提供区间值主观概率，此时你基本上是在询问他们的直觉。不知道会不会被起诉……

items.title: God gave me a sign" (remembering i live in San Francisco) "I mean, I was acasually influe…
items.title_zh: 上帝给了我一个标志”（记得我住在旧金山）“我的意思是，我不经意间受到了影响……
items.description: "God gave me a sign" (remembering i live in San Francisco) "I mean, I was acasually influenced by the ASI at the end of time to maximize EV for humanity"
items.description_zh: “上帝给了我一个标志”（记得我住在旧金山）“我的意思是，我在末日偶然受到 ASI 的影响，以最大限度地为人类提供电动汽车”

items.title: So the real constraint on human wealth was never resources.
items.title_zh: 因此，对人类财富的真正限制从来不是资源。
items.description: So the real constraint on human wealth was never resources. It was good ideas for how to serve one another, and the leverage to act on them. We just deleted the leverage constraint for everybody. Now it's only the ideas. Go have them, and…
items.description_zh: 因此，对人类财富的真正限制从来不是资源。这是关于如何相互服务以及采取行动的杠杆的好主意。我们刚刚删除了每个人的杠杆限制。现在只剩下想法了。去拥有它们，然后……

items.title: I'm in Osaka now, and it's clear: Japan already ran the experiment on the ceiling.
items.title_zh: 我现在在大阪，很明显：日本已经在天花板上进行了实验。
items.description: I'm in Osaka now, and it's clear: Japan already ran the experiment on the ceiling. Thirty years of zero growth and it built the best trains, service, and craft on earth. When you can't compete on more, you compete on better. Better AND mor…
items.description_zh: 我现在在大阪，很明显：日本已经在天花板上进行了实验。三十年的零增长，它建造了地球上最好的火车、服务和工艺。当你无法竞争更多时，你就可以竞争更好。更好、更多……
